'''Chackron Nasplek''' was an [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] who started a [[Courier/Legends|courier]] delivery service sometime after the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
Breaking with family tradition, Nasplek chose not to join the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|forces]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], but instead to start his own business in [[Kee-Piru]]. However, the city was destroyed by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire's]] [[World Devastator]]s during the [[Battle of Calamari]]. Luckily, Nasplek was on another system at the time of the attack, but lost all of his assets in the attack. He eventually re-established his business and it soon expanded beyond [[Dac/Legends|Mon Calamari]].

{{Char-stub}}
